ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs, exhibition) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games scheduled for the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 5-3, 2-1) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff, exhibition) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player's performance is being tracked */,
  "o_swing_pct" REAL /* Outside swing percentage */,
  "z_swing_pct" REAL /* Zone swing percentage */,
  "swing_pct" REAL /* Swing percentage */,
  "o_contact_pct" REAL /* Outside contact percentage */,
  "z_contact_pct" REAL /* Zone contact percentage */,
  "contact_pct" REAL /* Contact percentage */,
  "zone_pct" REAL /* Zone percentage */,
  "f_strike_pct" REAL /* First strike percentage */,
  "sw_str_pct" REAL /* Swinging strike percentage */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher, outfielder) */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_bats" TEXT /* Batting side (left, right, switch) */,
  "player_throws" TEXT /* Throwing side (left, right) */,
  "player_injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "player_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "player_contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player's statistics are being tracked */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "batting_avg" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage */,
  "defensive_stats" TEXT /* Defensive statistics (e.g., putouts, assists, errors) */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher, outfielder) */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_bats" TEXT /* Batting side (left, right, switch) */,
  "player_throws" TEXT /* Throwing side (left, right) */,
  "player_injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "player_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "player_contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
